sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Playable Character Switching
special_mechanics.description: Player controls Spider-Man and Venom through various levels. Two characters with potentially different movement properties, though not documented.

special_mechanics.name: Summoned Hero Assistance
special_mechanics.description: Other Marvel heroes (Captain America, Black Cat, Iron Fist, Cloak and Dagger, Deathlok, Morbius, Firestar) can be summoned via collected items. Summoned heroes help in different ways depending on which character summoned them.

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data only. Available sources provide gameplay overview and critical reception commentary but no quantified physics parameters. Sources note 'mediocre control' from Electronic Gaming Monthly and state the game 'controls well' from GamePro, but specific movement values are not documented.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Maximum Carnage (SNES)
Wikipedia - Spider-Man and Venom: Maximum Carnage
